items.title: Pick To Light Market Forecasts Report 2025-2030: E-Commerce Growth, Automated Warehouses and Retail Expansion Drive Adoption for Accuracy and Efficiency

items.description: The pick to light market is projected to grow from $658.66 million in 2025 to $916.85 million in 2030, driven by e-commerce expansion, warehouse automation, and global supply chain demands, with North America and Asia-Pacific leading market growth.
